basics.name: Lianghui Yi
basics.label: Forward Deployed Engineer
basics.summary: Forward Deployed Engineer with 7+ years leading end-to-end LLM deployment — shipped MCP-native AI applications from discovery to production rollout serving 100+ users and scaled a product to $1M ARR through direct customer engagement. Expert in system design, Python, JavaScript, and production AI rollout for strategic customers.

work.name: 24 Helpful, LLC
highlights: Led end-to-end technical delivery of aInbox — from customer discovery and system design through production rollout — deploying MCP-native AI middleware to 100+ beta users on multi-tenant AWS (EC2, Aurora Serverless, SES, per-user IAM roles).

Implemented OAuth 2.0 authorization and Streamable HTTP transport for MCP servers, resolving multi-week integration edge cases across Claude and ChatGPT client implementations to achieve stable production rollout.

Designed a self-evolving agent code loop (generator/evaluator) with GitHub Actions CI/CD that closes product iteration cycles in under 24 hours across multiple AI prototypes — directly accelerating customer feedback loops.
Codified deployment playbooks, runbooks, and shared AI-context conventions that standardized rollout of LLM-powered products to enterprise and early-adopter users.

work.name: 24Haowan Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Co-founded and scaled 24Haowan to $1,000,000 ARR in 2 years through data-driven product iteration, system design, and cross-functional collaboration.

Engaged directly with enterprise customers to scope technical requirements, uncover pain points, and convert 3 strategic accounts within 3 months — influencing product roadmap through customer feedback.
Led a cross-functional engineering team of 10 across Python/Node.js/PHP/Vue stack deployed on Kubernetes and Docker; drove Agile delivery cycles that improved team cadence over 6 months.
Designed gamified retention mechanics that drove measurable repeat-use loops for 100+ mall and SME customers, directly informing roadmap prioritization through cohort analytics.

work.name: Maiduote Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Launched a production platform that increased doctor-patient engagement by 30% through end-to-end delivery coordinating cross-functional teams across discovery, design, and rollout.
Drove customer-facing growth strategies that acquired 50,000+ users in 6 months, exceeding targets through targeted outreach and workflow optimization.

projects.name: aInbox (ainbox.io)
highlights: Built aInbox, an MCP-native AI agent middleware giving LLMs a dedicated inbox and async messaging layer — operated entirely via Model Context Protocol tools with no traditional UI.
Shipped multi-provider LLM deployment supporting ChatGPT and Claude chatbot clients with an LLM-driven triage and labeling pipeline, scaled to 100+ beta users.

projects.name: AgentFolio
highlights: Built AgentFolio, an open-source agentic portfolio engine (MIT-licensed) that generates JD-tailored resumes from a single markdown source using LLM-powered rewriting and JD-matching pipelines.
Designed a GitHub Actions pipeline for auto-generating JSON Resume + PDFs on data changes; zero third-party infrastructure cost.

projects.name: tokenman.io
projects.description: Hosted Claude Code terminal + auto-evolving workflow scaffold
highlights: Built terminal.tokenman.io, a multi-tenant Claude Code CLI hosting SaaS on EC2 with persistent tmux sessions and cloud-init provisioning for production-grade compute access.

skills.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
keywords: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)

education.institution: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications

volunteer.summary: Led community initiatives and organized weekly founder-focused events (1,000+ participants in one year).
Submitted a bug-fix pull request to Anthropic's public Claude Agent SDK demos repository for an issue discovered while integrating the released SDK.
